description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a modern, low-profile design, surrounded by a white perimeter fence. The structure features a dark, cross-gabled roof and a prominent central chimney. The front facade includes a wooden main door, large rectangular windows, and a paved driveway leading to a double garage. The landscaping includes a large tree on one side and several shrubs along the opposite edge, with a spacious, open yard. The rear of the bungalow has sliding glass doors opening onto a patio area, and the windows are arranged asymmetrically for a contemporary look. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted siding, contributing to the clean, modern aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark cross-gabled roof, large windows, and a fenced yard featuring a driveway, garage, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, driveway, garage doors, and a prominent tree to the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the double garage doors, backyard space, and the white perimeter fence.
description_view_2: Side view displaying sliding glass doors, a patio area, and asymmetrical window placement along the facade.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view with the cross-gabled roof, backyard, and a large tree near the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
